movies.title: تحت سابع أرض
movies.description: تحت سابع أرض هو مسلسل درامي مليء بالأحداث المثيرة التي تدور في أعماق الأرض. تتبع القصة مجموعة من الأشخاص الذين يجدون أنفسهم عالقين في مكان غريب ومظلم، حيث تبدأ المغامرات والتحديات التي تواجههم. يتميز هذا العمل بالتشويق والترقب، مع تفاصيل مثيرة ستجعلك تتابع الأحداث بشغف.

movies.title: معاوية
movies.description: مسلسل معاوية هو عمل درامي تاريخي يعرض قصة حياة الصحابي معاوية بن أبي سفيان. ينقلك العمل عبر أحداث مليئة بالدراما والتشويق مع لحظات مؤثرة.

movies.title: البطل
movies.description: البطل هو مسلسل درامي يشهد ظهور شخصية رئيسية تخوض مغامرات مليئة بالتحديات مع اختبارات قوة داخلية.

stars.name: Leonardo Dicaprio
stars.description: Leonardo DiCaprio is an American actor and film producer known for his intense roles in films such as 'Titanic' and 'Inception'. He is one of the most acclaimed actors of his generation.

stars.name: Jason Statham
stars.description: Jason Statham is an English actor and former competitive diver, known for his roles in action films, particularly 'The Transporter' series and 'The Expendables'.

stars.name: Shah Rukh Khan
stars.description: Shah Rukh Khan, often called the 'King of Bollywood', is an Indian actor, film producer, and television personality. He is one of the biggest film stars in the world.

stars.name: Margot Robbie
stars.description: Margot Robbie is an Australian actress and producer known for her roles in 'The Wolf of Wall Street' and 'Suicide Squad'. She is one of Hollywood's most successful actresses.
movies: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood

stars.name: Scarlett Johansson
stars.description: Scarlett Johansson is an American actress known for her versatile roles in films like 'The Avengers' series and 'Lost in Translation'. She is one of the highest-paid actresses in the world.

stars.name: Aras Bulut
stars.description: Aras Bulut İynemli is a Turkish actor known for his roles in TV series and films, including 'Çukur' and 'Miracle in Cell No. 7'.

stars.name: Neslihan Atagül
stars.description: Neslihan Atagül is a Turkish actress known for her roles in TV series and films, particularly 'Kara Sevda' and 'Fazilet Hanım ve Kızları'.

stars.name: Hrithik Roshan
stars.description: Hrithik Roshan is an Indian actor known for his dancing skills and his roles in Bollywood films like 'Jodhaa Akbar' and 'War'. He is one of India's most popular and highest-paid actors.

stars.name: Aamir Khan
stars.description: Aamir Khan is an Indian actor, director, and producer, renowned for his work in Bollywood. He is known for his socially relevant films and intense performances.

stars.name: Denzel Washington
stars.description: Denzel Washington is an American actor, director, and producer, regarded as one of the greatest actors of his generation, known for films such as 'Training Day' and 'Glory'.

stars.name: Deepika Padukone
stars.description: Deepika Padukone is an Indian actress and producer, known for her roles in Bollywood films like 'Padmaavat' and 'Chennai Express'. She is one of the highest-paid actresses in India.

stars.name: Gong Yoo
stars.description: Gong Yoo is a South Korean actor best known for his roles in the hit TV series 'Goblin' and the film 'Train to Busan'. He is widely regarded as one of Korea's top actors.

stars.name: Ma Dong-seok
stars.description: Ma Dong-seok is a South Korean actor known for his roles in action films and his portrayal of strong, charismatic characters in movies like 'Train to Busan'.

stars.name: Burak Özçivit
stars.description: Burak Özçivit is a Turkish actor and model, best known for his role in the popular TV series 'Diriliş: Ertuğrul' and for his roles in Turkish dramas.

stars.name: Ryan Reynolds
stars.description: Ryan Reynolds is a Canadian actor and producer known for his roles in 'Deadpool' and 'The Proposal'. He is known for his wit and comedy in Hollywood films.
